title: Willy Weapons
description: Adds more weapons to Minecraft for example, Sabers!
body:
Adds more weapons to Minecraft, use JEI for the recipes! The mod was heavily inspired by Spartan Weaponry, link here -> [https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry). Thanks to my friend, Wepoil for the idea to create this mod.

**RECIPES**
Recipes are shown with the JEI mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

**DISCLAIMER**
The lowest version the mod will go to is 1.20.1 and will not become a Fabric mod ever.
